text: In Italian, how do you say 'Good morning / Good day'? {{c1::Buongiorno}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: Buongiorno | Meaning: Good morning / Good day
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Good morning / Good day' en Italian? Buongiorno

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Good evening'? {{c1::Buonasera}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: Buonasera | Meaning: Good evening
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Good evening' en Italian? Buonasera

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Hello / Goodbye - Informal'? {{c1::Ciao}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: Ciao | Meaning: Hello / Goodbye - Informal
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Hello / Goodbye - Informal' en Italian? Ciao

text: In Italian, how do you say 'How are you? - Formal'? {{c1::Come sta?}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: Come sta? | Meaning: How are you? - Formal
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'How are you? - Formal' en Italian? Come sta?

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Goodbye - Formal'? {{c1::Arrivederci}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: Arrivederci | Meaning: Goodbye - Formal
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Goodbye - Formal' en Italian? Arrivederci

text: In Italian, how do you say 'See you soon'? {{c1::A presto}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: A presto | Meaning: See you soon
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'See you soon' en Italian? A presto

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Good night'? {{c1::Buonanotte}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: Buonanotte | Meaning: Good night
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Good night' en Italian? Buonanotte

text: In Italian, 'ciao' is an informal greeting that means both {{c1::hello / hi}} and {{c2::bye / goodbye}}.
explanation: 'Ciao' is the most popular informal greeting in Italian. It should not be used in formal contexts.
usage: Term: Ciao | Dialogue: - Ciao Marco! - Ciao Sofia, come va?
spanish: En italiano, 'ciao' es un saludo informal que significa tanto 'hola' como 'adiós'.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Good morning / Good day' formally? {{c1::Buongiorno}}
explanation: Used from morning until early afternoon as a polite greeting.
usage: Term: Buongiorno | Example: Buongiorno, Signor Rossi. (Good morning, Mr. Rossi.)
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Buenos días / Buen día' formalmente en italiano? Buongiorno.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Good night' (when going to bed)? {{c1::Buonanotte}}
explanation: Used specifically when someone is going to sleep or parting late at night.
usage: Term: Buonanotte | Example: Buonanotte, sogni d'oro. (Good night, sweet dreams.)
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Buenas noches (al acostarse)' en italiano? Buonanotte.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Goodbye' formally? {{c1::Arrivederci}}
explanation: Literally 'until we see each other again'. Used in shops, offices, or with strangers.
usage: Term: Arrivederci | Example: Grazie, arrivederci! (Thank you, goodbye!)
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Adiós' formalmente en italiano? Arrivederci.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Please'? {{c1::Per favore}} or {{c1::Per piacere}}.
explanation: Both phrases are extremely common and polite.
usage: Examples: Un caffè, per favore. (A coffee, please.) | Mi aiuti, per piacere. (Help me, please.)
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Por favor' en italiano? Per favore / Per piacere.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Thank you very much'? {{c1::Grazie mille}}
explanation: Literally 'a thousand thanks'. The standard way to show strong appreciation.
usage: Term: Grazie mille | Example: Grazie mille per l'aiuto. (Thank you very much for the help.)
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Muchas gracias' en italiano? Grazie mille.

text: In Italian, the standard response to 'Grazie' is '{{c1::Prego}}'.
explanation: 'Prego' means 'You're welcome'. It is also used by waiters or hosts to say 'Please (after you)' or 'How can I help you?'.
usage: Dialogue: - Grazie! - Prego.
spanish: En italiano, la respuesta estándar a 'Grazie' es 'Prego' (De nada).

text: In Italian, the informal way to ask someone their name is '{{c1::Come ti chiami?}}' and the response is '{{c2::Mi chiamo}} [Name]'.
explanation: Uses the reflexive verb 'chiamarsi' (to call oneself). Literally: 'How do you call yourself?'.
usage: Dialogue: - Come ti chiami? - Mi chiamo Jesus.
spanish: En italiano, la pregunta informal para preguntar el nombre es 'Come ti chiami?' y la respuesta es 'Mi chiamo...'.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Nice to meet you' when meeting someone for the first time? {{c1::Piacere}} or {{c1::Piacere di conoscerti}}.
explanation: 'Piacere' alone is very common. 'Piacere di conoscerti' is informal, and 'Piacere di conoscerla' is formal.
usage: Dialogue: - Mi chiamo Sofia. - Piacere, io sono Marco.
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Mucho gusto / Encantado' en italiano? Piacere / Piacere di conoscerti.

text: In Italian, how do you ask 'How are you?' informally? {{c1::Come stai?}} or {{c1::Come va?}}.
explanation: 'Come stai?' is for peers/friends. 'Come va?' is generic (How's it going?). The formal version is 'Come sta?'.
usage: Dialogue: - Ciao, come stai? - Bene, grazie. E tu?
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice '¿Cómo estás?' informalmente en italiano? Come stai? / Come va?.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Have a nice day' upon parting? {{c1::Buona giornata}}
explanation: Similar to French 'Bonne journée', used when leaving during the day.
usage: Term: Buona giornata | Example: Grazie, buona giornata! (Thank you, have a nice day!)
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Que tenga un buen día' al despedirse en italiano? Buona giornata.

text: In Italian, a very common and friendly way to say 'See you / See you later' is '{{c1::Ci vediamo}}'.
explanation: Literally means 'we see each other'. Used daily among friends and coworkers.
usage: Term: Ci vediamo | Example: Ciao ragazzi, ci vediamo domani! (Bye guys, see you tomorrow!)
spanish: En italiano, una forma muy común y amistosa de decir 'Nos vemos' es 'Ci vediamo'.

text: In Italian, how do you say 'Good day' as a wish when parting? {{c1::Buona giornata}}
explanation: Used when leaving during the day. Do not confuse with 'Buongiorno' which is used when arriving.
usage: Term: Buona giornata | Dialogue: - Arrivederci! - Buona giornata!
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Que tenga un buen día' al despedirse en italiano? Buona giornata.
